name: Feature request
about: Propose a new adapter or capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is this in scope?

Before filing, please read the "What's NOT in scope" section of the README.
Features that don't serve "correct proper nouns in multi-language transcripts"
will likely be declined.

New adapters (source / vocabulary / summarizer) are almost always in scope —
the architecture exists precisely to make them cheap to add.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Concrete scenario, not abstract.

## Proposed solution

What should happen? If it's a new adapter, which upstream tool — and does the
tool expose a stable API or local data we can read?

## Alternatives considered

Why can't this be solved with the existing adapters + `config.yaml`?

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I plan to open a PR for this
- [ ] I'd like someone else to pick it up
